subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, the Single, the One, the Incomparable, the Self-Sufficient, the All-Powerful, the Self-Subsisting, Who hath taken unto Himself no partner [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الفرد الواحد الاحد الصمد المقتدر القیوم الذی مااتخذ لنفسه شریکا و
subcodes.subjects: @Muhammad; Islam, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
